eyebrow.zh: 国产模型 · per-span 兜底门
eyebrow.en: 国产模型 · per-span fallback gate

headline.zh: 没把握的一步，别再让模型硬编下去
headline.en: Stop letting your model barrel through the step it isn't sure of

sub.zh: 把模型自报的不确定度和一次机器可校验的探针配对，只有两者同时亮红灯才把这一步交给人确认——其余全部放行。
sub.en: Pair the model's self-reported uncertainty with a machine-checkable probe; route the step to a human only when both go red — everything else proceeds.

scroll.en: See what it catches for you

title.zh: 只拦真正没把握的那一步
title.en: Halt only the step that's genuinely uncertain

body.zh: 单信号都不够：模型嘴上说没把握，或探针单独失败，都只是标记、不拦。只有「模型自报不确定 ∧ 探针真失败」同时出现，才把这一步交给人。
body.en: Either signal alone is not enough: the model saying it's unsure, or a probe failing on its own, just flags the step. Only when self-reported uncertainty AND a failed probe fire together does the step go to a human.

chips: › 不确定度 + 探针 同时亮

title.en: Four probes, each minding its own lane

body.zh: 每一步先过一道能跑出真假的探针：能不能编译、跑不跑得通测试、lint 干不干净、schema 对不对——机器说了算，不靠模型自我感觉。
body.en: Each step first clears a probe that returns a hard true/false: does it compile, do the tests pass, is the lint clean, is the schema valid — the machine decides, not the model's self-image.

title.en: A three-state gate that lets go when it should

body.zh: 双清就 proceed 放行；只有一路亮就 abstain 标记但不打断；双触发才 handoff 找人——把人工兜底留给真正需要的那几步。
body.en: Both clear → proceed; exactly one signal trips → abstain (flag, don't block); both fire → handoff to a human — reserving the human fallback for the few steps that actually need it.

title.en: Every step has a human on the other end

body.zh: 被拦下的 span 进 web 界面，逐 span 审批或驳回——不是把一整段 agent 跑完才发现问题，而是卡在哪一步、就在哪一步停下来确认。
body.en: A halted span lands in a web UI for per-span approve or reject — instead of discovering problems after the whole agent run, you stop and confirm exactly where it stalled.

headline.zh: 给你的国产模型 agent 装一道兜底门
headline.en: Give your 国产模型 agent a fallback gate

sub.zh: 一条命令装上，demo 里第 4 步就会弹门。
sub.en: Install in one command — the demo trips the gate at step 4.

tag.zh: MIT 开源 · 国产模型自治 agent 的 per-span 探针校验兜底门
tag.en: MIT open source · the per-span probe-validation fallback gate for 国产模型 autonomous agents
